Response 215012475

BioLab Sales and Innovation Lab

Public Service (PS) - activity is primarily ASU-led education, training, or public programming.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

BioLab Holdings gave us a $2.2M gift to build our BioLab Sales and Innovation Lab in the Department of Marketing. This will be a physical lab where we can promote experiential learning for our professional sales students. The gift also includes scholarships, travel funding for students, and a hig...
